class.name: E3DModelInstance
class.brief_description: Instantiates and displays a MaSzyna E3D model in the scene tree.
class.description: [E3DModelInstance] is the native runtime node used to display [E3DModel] resources. It can either use a directly assigned [member model] resource or load a model through [member data_path] and [member model_filename]. The node rebuilds its contents when reloaded and exposes signals for the loading lifecycle.

method.name: is_e3d_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] after the current model was instantiated successfully.

method.name: reload
method.description: Reloads the current E3D model and rebuilds the instantiated representation.

members.member: Base data directory used together with [member model_filename] when loading through [E3DModelManager].
When enabled, the instantiated node-based representation stays editable in the editor.
List of E3D node names that should be skipped during instantiation.
Selects which E3D instancer backend is used for this node.
Directly assigned E3D model resource. When set, it takes precedence over [member data_path] and [member model_filename].
Model filename relative to [member data_path] when loading through [E3DModelManager].
Array of skin overrides passed to the selected instancer.

signal.name: e3d_loaded
signal.description: Emitted after the current model was loaded and instantiated successfully.

signal.name: e3d_loading
signal.description: Emitted right before the current model starts reloading.

constants.constant: Uses the node-based backend and keeps generated nodes editable in the editor.
